title: Mini Grep
description: Build a simplified version of grep that searches through text for lines matching a given pattern and prints them with line numbers.
requirements: Accept a search pattern and text input
Search each line for the pattern (case-insensitive option)
Print matching lines with their line numbers
Report total number of matches found
hints: Use lines() to iterate over each line of the text
enumerate() gives you the index alongside each element
to_lowercase() on both query and line enables case-insensitive matching
filter_map() lets you filter and transform in one step
bonusChallenge: Add support for regex patterns using the regex crate. Add an option to show N lines of context before and after each match.
